stemHtml: Referring to the NAVSTAR/GPS satellite navigation system, what is the meaning of the term Pseudo Random Noise (PRN)?

options.a: PRN describes the continuous electro-magnetic background noise that exists in space.
options.b: PRN is a code used for the identification of the satellites and the measurement of the time taken by the signal to reach the receiver.
options.c: PRN is the atmospheric jamming that affects the signals transmitted by the satellites.
options.d: PRN occurs in the receiver. It is caused by the signal from one satellite being received from different locations.
